title: Marketing Manager – Monk’s Brew Club & Affiliated Cafes/Restaurants
description:
At Monk’s Brew Club, we are more than just a cafe – we create spaces for conversation, collaboration, and meaningful connections over great coffee, food, and experiences. We are looking for a Marketing Manager who brings energy, creativity, and strong execution to lead marketing across Monk’s Brew Club and our affiliate restaurants and cafes. Our affiliated businesses include Cugini Trattoria Pizzeria, a traditional authentic Italian restaurant and The Garden Slug, a pet friendly cafe both in the nearby Katong area.

Role Overview
You will own day-to-day marketing and content for all outlets, with a strong focus on social media, content creation, event coverage, and brand storytelling. You will also be the on-ground face of Monk’s Brew Club at events, capturing the buzz, interacting with guests, and turning moments into compelling content.

Key Responsibilities
Social Media Management

  • Plan and execute monthly content calendars aligned with campaigns, events, and business priorities.
  • Monitor performance, respond to DMs/comments, and build an engaged online community.

Content Creation & Storytelling

  • Conceptualize and produce reels, short-form videos, promotional videos, and UGC-style content that feels authentic and on-trend.
  • Capture candid moments, raw footage, behind-the-scenes content, vox pops, and short interviews with guests, partners and talent.

Event Presence & On-ground Marketing

  • Act as the face of Monk’s Brew Club at events – interact with guests, hosts, partners and creators to maintain positive PR and build relationships.
  • Work closely with the event programming and operations teams to ensure key moments are captured for future marketing use.

Website & Digital Assets

  • Ensure all digital touchpoints (Google business listings, delivery platforms, reservation platforms, etc.) are accurate and up to date.

Brand & Creative Direction

  • Maintain consistent tone of voice, visual identity, and messaging across all platforms and outlets.
  • Push creative boundaries by experimenting with new formats, collaborations, and storytelling styles while staying true to the brand.

Trendspotting & Growth

  • Identify seasonal, cultural and community moments we can tap into to stay relevant and top-of-mind.
  • Track basic performance metrics (reach, engagement, footfall drivers, campaign performance) and share insights with leadership.​

Collaboration & Coordination

  • Coordinate with photographers, designers, and influencers when needed, while still being hands-on with in-house content creation.​Support email marketing, partnerships and collaborations where relevant.

What We’re Looking For

  • 3–6 years of experience in marketing, social media, content creation or a similar role, ideally in F&B, lifestyle, hospitality or consumer brands.​
  • Strong portfolio showcasing reels, short-form video, photography and social campaigns.
  • Comfortable being on the floor at events, talking to people, and appearing on camera when needed.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with an eye for detail and aesthetics.
  • Hands-on experience with social media tools, basic editing apps (for photo/video), and CMS/website updates.
  • Self-driven, highly organized, and able to manage multiple outlets and stakeholders in a fast-paced environment.
  • A genuine interest in coffee, food, culture and community-building will be a strong plus.

What You’ll Get

  • A chance to shape the voice and presence of a growing group of cafes and restaurants that value community and creativity.
  • Lots of great coffee, food, and access to vibrant events and communities hosted at Monk’s Brew Club.
  • Supportive leadership that encourages experimentation, learning and professional growth.

If this sounds like you, apply here or send us your resume and portfolio (links to social handles or content work) to info@monksbrew.club and tell us why you’d be a great fit for this role.

districts.location: D15 Katong, Joo Chiat, Amber Road
